column1: # Distro-specific package name mappings for fixup_package_names()
#   <name>  = rename to this name on that distro
#   a+b     = expand to multiple packages (only build-essential on Termux)
# Only packages that DIFFER from the Debian name on at least one distro
# need entries here. Packages not listed pass through unchanged.
# What is handled INLINE in fixup_package_names (not driven by this file):
#   - WSL skips (all managers): auditd, apparmor-utils, rr
#   - APT Kali-only filtering: spike, enum4linux, bing-ip2hosts, etc.
# Note: auditd, apparmor-utils, rr also have entries below for their
# distro-level renames/skips (e.g. auditd→audit on dnf). Both layers apply.
# ----- Skipped: unavailable on most non-Debian distros -----------------------
